dependencies.name: LSTM Tool Tracking Model
dependencies.description: Convolutional LSTM model for tool tracking in laparoscopic videos

dependencies.name: Sample Surgical Video
dependencies.description: Sample surgical video for endoscopy tool tracking demonstration

dependencies.name: Holoscan Sample App Data for AI-based Endoscopy Tool Tracking
dependencies.description: This resource contains the convolutional LSTM model for tool tracking in laparoscopic videos by Nwoye et. al [1], and a sample surgical video.

dependencies.name: aja_card
dependencies.description: AJA video capture card for real-time video input

dependencies.description: AJA video capture card with hardware overlay for real-time display for live surgery with overlay, real-time feedback, and OR integration

dependencies.name: VTK
dependencies.description: Visualization Toolkit for advanced 3D rendering and visualization

default.description: Video replay mode using recorded endoscopy video for demos, testing, and development without hardware

aja.description: AJA card input with real-time video capture for live surgery, real-time processing, and production deployment

aja_overlay.description: AJA card with hardware overlay for real-time display for live surgery with overlay, real-time feedback, and OR integration

vtk.description: VTK-based rendering for advanced visualization for research, advanced visualization, and custom rendering
